profile.name: Varun NS
profile.tagline: An interactive resume — drag to explore the sphere.

cards.title: About Me
cards.subtitle: Product leader with an engineer's brain
cards.description: I build products and run transformations at the intersection of operations, data and design. Eight years in, I still believe the best product decisions come from sitting next to the people who use the thing. This sphere is my career — every card is a chapter. Drag around, get lost, click anything.

cards.title: Languages
cards.subtitle: Human ones, not just SQL
cards.description: English and Hindi professionally, Kannada natively. Comfortable presenting to a boardroom or debugging a requirement in the language the site team actually thinks in.

cards.title: Download Resume
cards.subtitle: Get the PDF version
cards.description: Click the button below to download a PDF copy of my traditional resume.

cards.title: Byju's
cards.subtitle: Business Development Associate
cards.description:
• Led customer acquisition initiatives by conducting product demonstrations and providing ongoing client support across Kolar, Tumkur, Mysore, and Chamarajanagar regions, fostering trust and enhancing the overall user experience.
• Onboarded 22 clients, generating over 15 lakhs in revenue, and consistently ranked as one of the top 2 performers in the team.
• Consistently exceeded sales targets on both a monthly and quarterly basis, driving business growth and contributing significantly to the team’s success.
• Trained and mentored 3 interns, equipping them with effective product demonstration skills to drive team success.

**Location:** Bangalore

cards.title: Sodexo
cards.subtitle: Innovation Lead
cards.description:
**Led digital transformation initiatives across facilities and food services** — moving paper-based site operations onto connected platforms.

• Shipped tooling used daily across dozens of client sites.
• Turned service-level reporting from a monthly scramble into a live dashboard habit.
• Managed cross-functional delivery between local operations and offshore engineering.

cards.title: Genpact
cards.subtitle: Assistant Manager - Lean Digital Transformation
cards.description:
• Developed a Transformation Tracker Dashboard using Power BI, serving as the single source of truth for leadership, overseeing all transformation projects across all service lines which included 40+ clients.
• Led improvement projects across 4 client accounts, working closely with clients and internal teams to drive efficiency and deliver measurable impact.
• Selected as the youngest global Agentic AI demo jockey at Genpact, trusted to lead client-facing demonstrations of $1.5M+ high-value Agentic AI offerings, contributing to customer acquisition and enterprise-level deal conversions.
• Increased auto-posting rates from 35% to 50% and 15% to 25% across two client accounts, eliminating manual efforts from receiving to payment processing of an invoice, leading to a $150k in client Value.
• Enhanced Helpdesk accuracy from 85% to 98% by creating and rigorously executing a 30-60-90 day improvement plan, eliminating inefficiencies and optimizing support processes.
• Reduced Direct Debit and GRNI balances, implementing a Problem-Solving Report (PSR) and consistently following up with vendors and clients, generating $35M+ in value.
• Led automation initiatives, including the implementation of tools such as language translation, duplicate payment detection, sentiment analysis, and Payment proposal creation in SAP, while also programming VBA macros to automate manual processes, delivering a $100k+ productivity benefit.
• Automated reporting using Power BI, streamlining client reporting, and enhancing issue analysis for seamless weekly updates.
• Implemented lean methodologies such as PSR, Daily Management, Value Stream Mapping (VSM), Value Generation Roadmap (VGR), and FMEA to identify critical pain points and improve key metrics like Paid On Time %, Holds, and Cost per Invoice.
• Implemented Daily Huddles and Lean training programs (70% adoption in 4 months) for frontline managers, enhancing problem-solving and efficiency while driving corporate communications and reporting.

cards.title: CARE Health
cards.subtitle: International Business (Market Research)
cards.description:
• Conducted in-depth market research on the health insurance sector across Jordan, Qatar, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, and Oman, providing actionable insights into potential growth opportunities for the company in these regions.
• Presented comprehensive research findings and market analysis to the International Business Head, playing a key role in refining expansion strategies and narrowing down options to two strategic countries.
• Analyzed health insurance plans from providers in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Fujairah, delivering strategic recommendations to enhance and optimize CHIL's offerings in the competitive market.

**Location:** Gurgaon

cards.title: MBA
cards.subtitle: PGDM(MBA), IMT Ghaziabad
cards.description: Went back to school to put language and frameworks around what I'd learned on the floor — corporate strategy, finance, organisational behaviour. Left with a sharper sense of how decisions actually get made in large organisations.

cards.title: Engineering
cards.subtitle: Bachelors of Engineering (Information Science)
cards.description:
**Bachelors of Engineering (Information Science), SJBIT Bangalore.**

An engineering degree taught me to decompose problems, respect constraints, and distrust any answer that arrives too easily. It's why I can sit in an architecture review and hold my own — and why I never hand-wave feasibility.

cards.title: Projects
cards.subtitle: Selected work & side quests
cards.description: A running index of shipped work — internal platforms, analytics products, automation pilots, and the occasional weekend experiment like the site you're standing inside right now.

cards.title: Digital Transformation
cards.subtitle: From paper trails to platforms
cards.description: Transformation isn't a software rollout — it's a behaviour change program with software attached. I run it as both: process mapping and tech selection on one track, champions, training and feedback loops on the other.

cards.title: Applied AI
cards.subtitle: LLMs as product material
cards.description:
**I treat large language models as a design material, not magic.**

• Shipped internal copilots for service and operations teams.
• Built robust evaluation harnesses before scaling to production.
• Learned where AI genuinely removes toil versus where it just relocates it.

cards.title: Hackathon Win
cards.subtitle: 48 hours to a funded prototype
cards.description: Won an internal hackathon with an AI triage assistant for service requests. The demo earned a small budget, the pilot earned a real one, and the tool is still in use — proof that speed and rigour aren't opposites.

cards.title: RPA Programs
cards.subtitle: Bots for the boring parts
cards.description: Scoped and delivered robotic process automation for finance and operations back offices. Learned the hard lessons early: stabilise the process first, automate second, and monitor forever.

cards.title: This Website
cards.subtitle: A resume you can stand inside
cards.description: Built with Next.js, React Three Fiber and GSAP — a spherical gallery with custom inertial camera controls, canvas-generated card textures, and handcrafted transitions. Yes, it's over-engineered. That's the point.

cards.title: Certifications
cards.subtitle: CSPO · SQL · Generative AI
cards.description: Certified Scrum Product Owner, advanced SQL for data analysis, and recent certifications in generative AI for product teams. I collect credentials the way I collect tools — only when I intend to use them.

cards.title: Artificial Intelligence
cards.subtitle: AI Strategy & Implementation
cards.description: Leveraging AI for business automation, developing agentic AI solutions, and evaluating language models to drive real-world impact.

cards.title: Product Sense, Innovation
cards.subtitle: Building what matters
cards.description: Deep understanding of user needs, framing market strategies, structuring outcome-first roadmaps, and prioritizing impactful features.

cards.title: SQL
cards.subtitle: Data extraction & analysis
cards.description: Fluent in interrogating business data using SQL, optimizing queries, and translating raw tables into actionable insights.

cards.title: Power BI
cards.subtitle: Dashboards & Visualization
cards.description: Building robust Power BI models and designing KPI frameworks that change Monday morning decisions.

cards.title: Digital Transformation & Automation
cards.subtitle: Process engineering
cards.description: Moving paper-based operations onto connected platforms and implementing tooling that drives productivity and efficiency.

cards.title: Lean Methodologies
cards.subtitle: PSR, VSM, Kaizen, VGR
cards.description: Implementing lean methodologies such as PSR, Daily Management, Value Stream Mapping (VSM), Value Generation Roadmap (VGR), and FMEA to identify critical pain points.

cards.title: Volunteering
cards.subtitle: Skills, donated
cards.description: Digital-literacy workshops and pro-bono analytics for local non-profits. Working with tiny budgets and huge constraints is the purest product training there is.

cards.title: Contact
cards.subtitle: Let's build something
cards.description: The fastest route is email — varun99ns@gmail.com. You can also reach me at 7019418655 or connect with me on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/varun-ns-a72a77192/. I'm open to product and transformation roles where the problem is messy, the stakes are real, and the team is serious about craft.
